title: Subitem Automation
excerpt: I know I can do an automation if a subitem changes, but I have 23 subitems and 13 of them need separate emails when status changes to completed.  Is there a way to make an automations for when a specific subitem is compl…

posts.author: jdavr1964 (David Ryan)
posts.cookedHtml: I know I can do an automation if a subitem changes, but I have 23 subitems and 13 of them need separate emails when status changes to completed. Is there a way to make an automations for when a specific subitem is completed to send the email associated with that subitem?

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
@jdavr1964 ,
How do you differentiate the subitems that you want a notification for from the rest?
These are the “and only if” options for sub item automations

If you don’t already have a way to differentiate these items, you could add a “Status column” that is titled Notify with two options “Yes” or “No”
Then your automation could look like this

image1192×335 12.2 KB

It looks like Gmail and Outlook do not support subitems in automations, so this is limited to monday.com internal notifications.

Hopefully this helps!
